name: reboot-hub-dji-drone-specs-used-price-index
title: Reboot Hub DJI Drone Specs and Used Price Index: Q3 2026 Baseline
description: A Q3 2026 public package containing 43 aircraft model-level price aggregates that summarize 251 published Reboot Hub catalog configurations, plus example repair-risk records and inspection context. Listed prices are not inventory claims or completed-sale prices.

resources.name: model-price-summary-2026-q3
resources.title: Q3 2026 model-level listed-price summary
resources.description: Complete public table of 43 aircraft model-level aggregates summarizing 251 published Reboot Hub catalog configurations. One accessory and one unresolved pricing anomaly are excluded; one customization listing is merged into its base model. The underlying configuration rows are not included.

resources.name: model-price-summary-2026-q3-jsonl
resources.title: Q3 2026 model-level listed-price summary in JSON Lines
resources.description: JSON Lines mirror of the complete 43-row public aircraft-model aggregate table.

resources.name: model-price-summary-schema
resources.title: JSON Schema for model-level summary records
resources.description: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 definitions for the aggregate CSV and JSON Lines records.

resources.name: sample-records
resources.title: Q3 2026 baseline sample records
resources.description: Four illustrative records showing the richer repair-risk record format. This file is not the complete price summary.

resources.name: sample-record-schema
resources.title: JSON Schema for illustrative repair-risk records
resources.description: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 field definitions for sample_records.jsonl.

resources.name: release-manifest
resources.title: Version 0.2.0 release integrity manifest
resources.description: Release boundary, DOI identifiers, byte sizes, and SHA-256 checksums for the archived source files.

resources.name: citation-metadata
resources.title: Citation File Format metadata
resources.description: Citation metadata carrying the versioned Zenodo DOI.
